titles.title: Extinction Prevention Act of 2026
Extinction Prevention Act of 2026
Freshwater Mussel Conservation Fund Act of 2026
North America Butterfly Conservation Fund Act of 2026
Pacific Islands Plant Conservation Fund Act of 2026
Southwest Desert Fish Conservation Fund Act of 2026

A bill to create dedicated funds to conserve butterflies in North America, plants in the Pacific Islands, freshwater mussels in the United States, and desert fish in the Southwest United States, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works.
